remember: Students will be able to recall the importance of sports nutrition in athletic performance.
Students will be able to list the different types of nutrients required by the body for optimal functioning.
Students will be able to identify the role of carbohydrates, proteins, and fats in energy production.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of macronutrients and micronutrients and their functions.
Students will be able to explain the importance of hydration in sports performance.
Students will be able to describe the different stages of nutrition planning and its application in sports.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of sports nutrition to develop personalized meal plans.
Students will be able to recommend suitable food choices for different types of athletes.
Students will be able to design a nutrition plan for an athlete to meet their energy needs during competition.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of different dietary patterns on athletic performance.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a nutrition plan in improving athletic performance.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different sports nutrition strategies and their outcomes.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of sports nutrition and its importance in athletic performance.
To identify the different types of nutrients required by the body for optimal functioning.
To describe the role of carbohydrates, proteins, and fats in energy production and their application in sports.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the different types of sports nutrition plans and their application in sports.
To explain the importance of nutrition planning in sports performance.
To describe the different stages of nutrition planning and its application in sports.
